title: spgr-8ar Piece B — Remote-Source Import + Sync (env-var auth)
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for a RefreshConstitutionLayer RPC and CLI commands for remote constitution import/sync.
notes: Implementation plan (task checklist) rather than pure requirements/spec/decision doc; defers to referenced design spec for actual requirements and decisions. Classified as DOC (context/process artifact) rather than SPEC since it doesn't itself define contracts, only implements ones defined elsewhere.
